properties.markdown:
# 🛡️ Cloud Intrusion Behavior Analytics Platform
**Real-time honeypot monitoring dashboard** | Region: `${aws_region}` | Log Group: `${log_group_name}`

properties.title: Session Events Over Time
properties.query: SOURCE '${log_group_name}' | fields @timestamp, eventid | filter eventid in ['cowrie.session.connect', 'cowrie.session.close', 'cowrie.login.success', 'cowrie.login.attempt'] | stats count(*) as count by eventid | sort count desc

properties.title: Top Attacker IPs
properties.query: SOURCE '${log_group_name}' | fields src_ip | filter ispresent(src_ip) | stats count(*) as attempts by src_ip | sort attempts desc | limit 10

properties.title: Login Attempts vs Success
properties.query: SOURCE '${log_group_name}' | fields @timestamp, eventid, username | filter eventid like /login/ | stats count(*) as count by eventid

properties.title: Commands Executed
properties.query: SOURCE '${log_group_name}' | fields @timestamp, command | filter ispresent(command) | stats count(*) as executions by command | sort executions desc | limit 15

properties.title: Recent Intrusion Events (Last 50)
properties.query: SOURCE '${log_group_name}' | fields @timestamp, eventid, src_ip, username, command | sort @timestamp desc | limit 50
